_comment: Quality bars for the extraction eval harness. `--check` exits non-zero if any metric drops below its threshold. Thresholds are set ~5-10pp below observed-at-baseline so flaky LLM variance doesn't false-positive — they're absolute floors, not the target. To raise the bar (because a new prompt observably beats the current numbers), update thresholds and observed_at_baseline together in one commit and document the diff in the commit message.
